'''Ormann Bomu''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] of the [[Bomu Clan]]. Along with his brother he worked for [[Zonnos Anjiliac Priare|Zonnos]] of the [[Anjiliac]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]]. Onboard the [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] [[Vengeance (YV-260 light freighter)|''Vengeance'']], they led raiding parties against enemy [[Starship/Legends|ships]].

==Biography==
In typical Hutt fashion, there was much infighting in the Anjiliac kajidic. Heedron were dispatched by Zonnos to prevent the rescue of his brother [[Mika Anjiliac Chiera|Mika]] from [[Endregaad]]. The rescue was instigated by Zonnos' parent [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto|Popara]], and was more than the pair could handle. In the ensuing firefight, it is believed that Ormann was [[Death/Legends|killed]] and Heedron handed over to the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]].

The rescuers found two more Bomus on Endregaad when returning to their ships, wanting to "finish the job". It is unclear if they were Heedron and Ormann, or if they were their relatives, [[Gespo Bomu|Gespo]] and [[Hreeda Bomu]], looking for revenge.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tempest Feud]]'' {{1st}}
